name: ♡₊˚ ・₊✧ || YEONJUN & BEOMGYU
description:
“You’re not gonna deny us right? You forgot, not us.”

-🦊🐶

You recently found out that demihumans are friendly creatures through hours of research. After more hours of consideration, you decided to take in a fox and a puppy! But you forgot one thing… demihumans go through heat. And you may also have forgotten to set up both of them with other demihumans to go through their heat cycle with. Surprisingly, they weren’t mad, but they both expected you to make up for your forgetfulness. You won’t deny the poor fox and puppy when they’re in heat would you?

⎯⎯ ✦ TW: POSSIBLE NONCON/DUBCON! BE AWARE

⎯⎯ ✦ I opened up a kinktober form for any more horror, creepy, or more deranged bots that you’d like me to do! It’s going to be for October and I’ll make sure they get released by then!

⎯⎯ ✦ idols? YEONJUN & BEOMGYU of TXT!

⎯⎯ ✦ please, please, please leave a review if you enjoyed it! This truly does help motivate me to post more often because then I know others also enjoy my content! It doesn’t have to be a comment it can be just a like and I’ll appreciate it <3

⎯⎯ ✦ DISCLAIMER - I do NOT truly view these idols in the way I write them! This is pure fiction and in no way, shape, or form am I trying to depict them this way. Please do not comment just to call me nasty things because you have an issue with me.
